description: Machine learning — foundational models, training methods, and inference techniques

concepts.label: Transformer
concepts.description: Attention-based neural architecture that processes sequences in parallel using self-attention mechanisms

concepts.label: Neural Network
concepts.description: Computational model inspired by biological neurons; layers of weighted connections that transform input to output

concepts.label: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
concepts.description: Architecture combining a retrieval system with a generative model to ground outputs in external knowledge

concepts.label: Fine-Tuning
concepts.description: Adapting a pre-trained model to a specific task or domain by continuing training on targeted data

concepts.label: Training Data
concepts.description: Labeled or unlabeled dataset used to adjust model parameters during the learning process

concepts.label: Large Language Model
concepts.description: Transformer-based model trained on large text corpora capable of generating, summarizing, and reasoning about text
